# Pice

**Summary**: A circuit simulation program used to model and analyze the performance of electronic circuits.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1997-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 1997]] used Pspice to simulate three-phase and six-phase oscillators to verify theoretical results and evaluate the impact of non-idealities.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Simulation results for frequency of oscillation deviated from theoretical values by less than 6% when using a non-ideal model. ([[1997-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 1997, p. 62]])
